query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.claim_id,
  LEFT(a.damage_description, 200) AS damage_desc_preview,
  LEFT(a.forensic_analysis, 200) AS forensic_preview,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.structural_damage_severity,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.created_at
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.damage_description LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR a.damage_description LIKE '%Mandava%'
   OR a.damage_description LIKE '%school%'
   OR a.damage_description LIKE '%School%'
   OR a.forensic_analysis LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR a.forensic_analysis LIKE '%Mandava%'
   OR a.forensic_analysis LIKE '%school%'
   OR a.causal_chain_json LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR a.causal_chain_json LIKE '%school%'
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
